title: Unions, Unknown Values, and Control-Flow Narrowing · Independent Type Trial
summary: Convert an unknown status feed into trusted records using evidence-producing guards and exhaustive decisions. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of an unknown-to-domain validation pipeline with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use only operations valid for every union member until evidence supports narrowing.
Choose unknown, any, and never from trust, escape-hatch, and impossibility semantics.
Narrow with typeof, equality, truthiness, in, instanceof, and discriminant checks while respecting edge cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
